hero.title: Terra Latitude: Origin at the center of the planet
hero.subtitle: Connecting the most exclusive coffee and cacao from Ecuador directly to the global market.

legitimacy.title: Governance and Transparency
legitimacy.desc: Backed by Ecuadorian regulatory institutions to guarantee safe and legitimate exports.

heritage.label: Chronicles of Origin / Хроники происхождения
heritage.title: Heritage and Legacy: The History of Coffee and Cacao in the Center of the World
heritage.subtitle: Наследие и легенда: История кофе и какао в Центре Мира
heritage.coffee_title: The Black Gold of the Andes
heritage.coffee_desc_es: Since the 19th century, Ecuadorian coffee has been a cultural bridge. Grown on the slopes of volcanoes, its unique profile is the result of unparalleled geography on the terrestrial equator.
heritage.coffee_desc_ru: С XIX века эквадорский кофе служил культурным мостом. Выращенный на склонах вулканов, его уникальный профиль — результат бесподобной географии на земном экваторе.
heritage.cacao_desc_es: Ecuador is the cradle of cacao. Archaeological research places the origin of cacao consumption in the Ecuadorian Amazon over 5,000 years ago.
heritage.cacao_desc_ru: Эквадор — колыбель какао. Археологические исследования подтверждают, что употребление какао началось в эквадорской Амазонии более 5000 лет назад.

products.label: Our Portfolio / Наш портфель
products.title: Excellence from Origin
products.arabica_desc: Арабика Сетка 15-17. Grown at 1,200m+ with citrus and floral cup profiles.

logistics.label: Transcontinental Logistics
logistics.title: Ecuador Express Route: Guayaquil — St. Petersburg
logistics.desc: We optimize the B2B supply chain with strategic alliances with MSC and Maersk, guaranteeing record times and thermal traceability.
logistics.feature1_desc: Port of Guayaquil (Contecon/TPG) without unnecessary transshipments.
logistics.feature2_desc: Food-Grade containers with IoT moisture monitoring.

eudr.title: My Farm, My Footprint
eudr.subtitle: Моя ферма, мой след
eudr.desc: Our traceability platform is 100% compliant with EUDR regulations. We provide precise geolocation for each lot to guarantee zero deforestation.
eudr.card1_desc: Exact polygons of our producing partners' farms in the Andean foothills.
eudr.card2_desc: Digital documentation accessible via QR for each sack exported to the Eurasian Economic Union.
eudr.card3_desc: Fair trade verification and direct technical support to rural communities.

model.title: Our Operating Model
model.label: Steps toward export
model.step1_desc: Our agronomists cup and select the best micro-lots directly at origin, ensuring physical and sensory consistency.
model.step2_desc: Milling and electronic sorting to meet the screen and grade standards requested by the B2B client.
model.step3_desc: Complete document management: Phytosanitary Certificates, Origin, and compliance with Russian import regulations.
model.step4_desc: Tracking until unloading at Baltic ports or designated land terminals.

benefits.title: Driving Shared Growth
benefits.card1_desc: We eliminate unnecessary intermediaries to maximize producer return and competitiveness for the importer.
benefits.card2_desc: Long-term contracts ensuring constant volumes even during seasons of high volatility.

contact.title: Start Your Next Import
contact.desc: Our bilingual team is ready to advise you in Spanish and Russian.

footer.hq_address: Av. de las Américas, Guayaquil, Ecuador | Business Center, Floor 12
